name: E-1 severity override: invalid severity string is rejected by doctor --explain with an allowed=off|warn|error|0|1|2 message
command: printf 'rules:\n  g-ts-001: critical\n' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain g-ts-001 --profile p.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_severity=critical' err.txt && grep -q 'allowed=off|warn|error|0|1|2' err.txt && echo rejected 1>&2
